violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Beef stew was placed hot in the refrigerator in a tightly covered container. Beef stew was made this morning and was uncovered during inspection to complete cooling process. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chili and lasagna observed in the 2-door reach-in in tightly covered pans. Temperatures observed at 59- and 62-degrees F. Foods had been prepared this morning. Pans should not be covered until foods are at 41 degrees F to cool properly. Pans were uncovered during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

A couple of individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
